tagline: A residential interior studio drawing, specifying, and on-site directing homes across Maharashtra.
footer_credit: Powered by Etihad Interiors Theme v1.3.0

palette._comment: Forest family (taste-skill Section 4.2 locked palette). ink = deep green, paper = bone, accent = amber, muted = forest-shadow green. NOT the AI-default beige/brass/oxblood family.

hero.headline: Homes drawn, built, and lived in
hero.subtext: Etihad Interiors is a residential studio in Kalyan. Twenty-four weeks. One team. Drawings, materials, and on-site direction from the same hands.
